raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Phillips 66 cited long-term uncertainty regarding its ability to operate in California as the reason for its refinery shutdown.",
    "Phillips 66's closure accounts for 8% of California's refining capacity.",
    "Valero's CEO indicated that all options, including closing its two California refineries, are on the table due to the California regulatory environment.",
    "The California Energy Commission and industry experts indicate that the gas storage mandate risks higher average gas prices.",
    "California's gas storage mandate may lead to fuel shortages as refineries are forced to withhold supplies from the market.",
    "An independent study projected that the update to California's Low Carbon Fuel Standard could raise gas prices by as much as 65 cents per gallon.",
    "California drivers pay the highest gas taxes in the nation, adding 88 cents per gallon to the cost of gas.",
    "Environmental mandates add an additional 45 cents per gallon to gas prices in California.",
    "California gas prices are currently $1.44 above the national average."
  ]
}
```
